# denseDeltaMatrix

**Instance Property**

A dense matrix of segment delta values for extrema, in column order. The columns correspond to the axis extrema, with minimum first, then maximum

## Declaration

```swift
var denseDeltaMatrix: [Double] { get set }
```
title: denseDeltaMatrix
